user_query: Add a zucchini noodle pesto bowl dinner option for mother on day 4

fields.name: Zucchini Noodle Pesto Bowl
fields.short_description: Light, low-carb zucchini noodles tossed with bright basil pesto, cherry tomatoes, toasted pine nuts, and a sprinkle of parmesan — a fresh, satisfying dinner option.
fields.meal_suggestion: Spiralize 2–3 medium zucchinis into noodles and lightly sauté or toss raw to preferred texture. Prepare pesto by blending fresh basil, garlic, lemon juice, olive oil, grated parmesan, and toasted pine nuts (or walnuts for a milder flavor). Toss zucchini noodles with pesto until evenly coated. Fold in halved cherry tomatoes and a handful of baby spinach or arugula. Top with extra toasted nuts and a light grate of parmesan. Serve warm or chilled with a wedge of lemon on the side. For added protein, serve with grilled shrimp, sliced chicken breast, or a scoop of white beans.

ingredients.name: optional: grilled shrimp or chicken / white beans

fields.nutrition_note: Low in refined carbs and calories while high in vitamins A and C from zucchini and tomatoes; basil and olive oil provide antioxidants and healthy monounsaturated fats; pine nuts add heart-healthy fats and trace minerals. Easily boosted with lean protein for a balanced macronutrient profile.

insertion_point.reasoning: Append as a new dinner option for Mother's day 4. The light, vegetable-forward zucchini noodle pesto complements the existing dinners and provides a lower-carb, fresh alternative.
